# removeDragCaret()

**Instance Method**

Removes the drag caret that indicates the destination of a drag operation.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func removeDragCaret()
```

## Dragging

- **element(at:)**: Returns a dictionary description of the element at a given point in the receiver’s coordinates.
- **moveDragCaret(to:)**: Moves the drag caret that indicates the destination of a drag operation to a given point.

items.description: Returns a dictionary description of the element at a given point in the receiver’s coordinates.

items.description: Moves the drag caret that indicates the destination of a drag operation to a given point.
